description: Bun WebGPU benchmark: Doe (@simulatte/webgpu FFI) vs bun-webgpu

doe.notes: Doe FFI provider backed by libdoe_webgpu via Bun FFI

comparability.notes: Both providers measured at JS API boundary via performance.now(). Apples-to-apples: same workload code, same dispatch geometry, same buffer sizes.

claimability.notes: Doe must beat bun-webgpu at both p50 and p95 with >=19 timed samples.
